acceptance.baseline: No explicit best_stack cadence entries for body.skeleton_stride or ball.detection_stride; BODY cadence was not a manifest-owned default.
acceptance.after: configs/racketsport/best_stack.json revision 8 adds WIRED_DEFAULT body.skeleton_stride=2, ball.detection_stride=1, and cadence.future_stage_pattern. process_video resolves both from best_stack and exposes --body-skeleton-stride/--ball-detection-stride.
acceptance.target: Per-stage cadence knobs resolved through best_stack.json, explicit BALL full-rate, CLI overrides per knob.

acceptance.baseline: BODY heavy skeleton path scheduled every tracked frame by default in the frame materialization/body_compute paths.
acceptance.after: BODY defaults to skeleton_stride=2 from best_stack; frame materialization schedules base frames by stride and body_compute records body_skeleton_stride_skip. BALL remains detection_stride=1 and non-1 CLI values are rejected.
acceptance.target: BODY default stride-2 at frame scheduling level; BALL still full-rate.

acceptance.baseline: No explicit test guaranteed contact/event boosts survived BODY base stride.
acceptance.after: Added tests proving event/deep mesh frames are unioned over stride-2 base frames and contact-dense extra frames remain scheduled; fixture summary event_extra_frame_count=15 and scheduled_vs_total_frame_count={scheduled:36,total:41}.
acceptance.target: Stride applies to BASE cadence only; contact/event boosts preserved.

acceptance.baseline: PIPELINE_SUMMARY stages[body] did not expose cadence or scheduled-vs-total counts.
acceptance.after: body_compute emits base_skeleton_stride, effective_stride, total/base/event counts, scheduled_vs_total_frame_count, and scheduled_vs_total_player_frame_count; process_video copies them into stages[body].metrics.
acceptance.target: Honest BODY cadence metrics in PIPELINE_SUMMARY.

acceptance.baseline: best_stack revision 7; no cadence doctrine entries.
acceptance.after: Revision 8 with ball.detection_stride=1, body.skeleton_stride=2, and cadence.future_stage_pattern, all WIRED_DEFAULT with owner-ruling notes.
acceptance.target: Revision bump and pre-authorized stride-2 default flip represented in best_stack.

changes: configs/racketsport/best_stack.json:3 bumped revision to 8 and added cadence doctrine entries.
scripts/racketsport/process_video.py:200 resolves BODY/BALL cadence defaults from best_stack, threads options/remote config, adds CLI validation, summary metrics, and override reporting.
threed/racketsport/process_video_body_frames.py:84 adds skeleton_stride base-frame scheduling plus event/deep mesh union metadata.
threed/racketsport/body_compute.py:21 loads default body.skeleton_stride from best_stack, applies stride to base BODY scheduling, preserves event extras, and emits cadence summaries.
scripts/racketsport/remote_body_dispatch.py:87 threads body_skeleton_stride through remote BODY dispatch.

full_suite.failure_notes: Only the six expected local loopback-bind sandbox failures failed, all PermissionError [Errno 1] Operation not permitted during ThreadingHTTPServer bind to 127.0.0.1: three in test_court_keypoint_review_server.py and three in test_review_input_server.py.

honest_issues: objective_result is PARTIAL because the full tests/racketsport census is not green, even though all lane acceptance targets and targeted tests passed.
VERIFIED=0 remains binding; this lane wires cadence behavior and mocked/process-level tests but does not promote BODY accuracy.
Skipped non-event BODY frames rely on existing downstream reuse/interpolation/render behavior rather than new synthesized skeletons.
BALL detection_stride is surfaced but pinned to 1; non-1 BALL cadence is rejected in this lane.
Full jsonschema validation could not run because jsonschema is not installed in the local .venv; report JSON validity and schema-shape were checked with dependency-free Python.
Unrelated dirty files remain untouched: configs/ssh/a100_known_hosts, brand-exploration/, and CVAT export zips.
